name: SelectionMode
summary: Possible selection modes for multiple selection using InputFunctionStarter

enum_values.name: eSelectGeometry
enum_values.summary: Result of the selection is only the selected element

enum_values.name: eSelectObject
enum_values.summary: Result of the selection is the selected element with all its related elements (e.g. wall tier together with axis, labels, attribute container, etc...) and all child elements (if existing)

enum_values.name: eSelectSubObject
enum_values.summary: Result of the selection is the selected element with some related elements (e.g. wall tier with labels and attribute container)
